---
name: 🏗️ Architecture Proposal
about: Propose a significant architectural change or new system
title: '[ARCHITECTURE] '
labels: 'architecture'
---

## Summary
Brief summary of the proposal.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this address? Why is the current approach insufficient?

## Proposed Solution
Detailed description of the solution.

## Rationale
Why is this the best approach? What alternatives were considered?

## Impact Analysis
- **Benefits:**
- **Risks:**
- **Backward Compatibility:** Yes/No/With Migration

## Should this proposal result in a new ADR?
- [ ] Yes, this requires a new Architecture Decision Record
- [ ] No, this is a minor clarification or extension
- [ ] Unsure (please advise)

If yes, provide initial ADR outline:
- Problem statement
- Decision/solution
- Rationale
- Consequences

## Alignment
- [ ] Follows Constitution
- [ ] Respects ADRs 001-005
- [ ] Aligns with specifications
- [ ] Maintains backward compatibility

## Related Documents
Relevant ADRs, specifications, or registries.
